issues.title: update: rust-openssl
issues.body:
Name: rust-openssl
CVEs: CVE-2026-10001
CVSSs: 8.1
Action Needed: update to >= 0.10.78
Summary: Rust OpenSSL bindings need an update for upstream OpenSSL fixes.

refmap.gentoo: https://bugs.gentoo.org/10001

issues.title: update: libgcrypt
issues.body:
Name: libgcrypt
CVEs: upstream-libgcrypt-side-channel
CVSSs: n/a
Action Needed: update to >= 1.12.2
Summary: libgcrypt has an upstream side-channel hardening fix.

refmap.gentoo: https://bugs.gentoo.org/2088

issues.title: update: c-ares
issues.body:
Name: c-ares
CVEs: CVE-2026-20001
CVSSs: 6.5
Action Needed: update to >= 1.35.0
Summary: c-ares resolver issue fixed upstream.

refmap.gentoo: https://bugs.gentoo.org/1970

issues.title: update: sssd
issues.body:

CVEs: CVE-2026-20002

issues.title: update: podman
issues.body:
Name: podman
CVEs: CVE-2026-20003

issues.title: update: perl
issues.body:
